▸ 	When we use it
▸ 	How to Use it
▸ 	Uber Meta Example (Copy School)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 21 --

HOW THE NEXT 60 MINS WILL GO
▸ 	Part 2: Live Q&A (type your q's into chat)
▸ 	Give as much detail as possible.
▸ 	Be ready to answer some clarifying q's
▸ 	Be willing to drill deeper until you feel confident taking
action.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 21 --

GOT FOMO?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 21 --

FEAR OF MISSING OUT (FOMO)
▸ 	Can't be reserved for JUST your prospect: 	If you're gonna ask
them to feel it -- you gotta meet them halfway and feel it
yourself. In doing so, you elicit THEIR empathy - and make them
feel safer in reciprocating it.
▸ 	Why are YOU afraid of them missing out?
▸ 	People don’t care what you know until they know you care. It's
on you as the marketer to make the first move.
▸ 	The more you stack your genuine reasons for caring -- the less
it feels like a push and pull tussle for their hard earned dollar.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 6 of 21 --

Don't be the "we're about to have so much fun without you" marketer
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 7 of 21 --

Be the "Rose telling Jack I'll never let you go" marketer
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 8 of 21 --

K, RY... CAN WE PLZ MAKE
THIS PRACTICAL NOW?
You
10X LAUNCHES 	www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 9 of 21 --

www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 10 of 21 --

BONUS THEMEPLATE #1....
"THE PIGLET"
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 11 of 21 --

BONUS THEMEPLATE #1 - THE PIGLET
WHY WE USE IT
▸ 	Reverse FOMO: 	Show our prospect why it matters
to US that they take action.
▸ 	Mirror Neurons (science FTW): 	By leading with our
own concern, our prospects are more likely to feel
OK getting in touch with their own (or mirroring
ours out of empathy)
▸ 	Win-Win: 	The conversion becomes an opp to solve
one another's problems which is VERY satisfying
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 12 of 21 --

BONUS THEMEPLATE #1 - THE PIGLET
WHERE WE USE IT
▸ 	Last Day to Sign Up: For a webinar, workshop
series, challenge, etc. (anything where value
will be given)
▸ 	Last Day of Offer: 	The first email on the last
day of a promotion.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
